title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors

sources.title: 2022 NAICS definition and index entries for 238220
sources.what_it_supports: The packet's scope narrative: the frozen research target is an HVAC-focused contractor within NAICS 238220, rather than an industry-wide claim.

narrative.executive_view: This packet concerns only the frozen HVAC-focused contractor archetype within NAICS 238220. Target-specific economic primitives have not been supplied, so no economic conclusion is asserted.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No selected-archetype accrual revenue, pass-through documentation, or controllable-value-added reconciliation was available. Equipment, materials, and controlled subcontracted delivery are not silently treated as pass-through.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen source-free role taxonomy is preserved, but no target payroll, contractor ledger, or removable cash-cost evidence establishes cash removability. Task change is not represented as cash savings.
narrative.implementation: No selected-archetype workflow logs, before-and-after cases, vendor invoices, or change records establish year-specific operational realization or implementation investment.
narrative.commercial_capture: No selected-archetype contracts, price books, cohort renewals, bid outcomes, or matched pricing history establish commercial retention after operational realization.
narrative.buyability: No closed sale-availability census, access history, process outcomes, or buyer operating data establishes sale availability, access and win, deal execution, or onboarding capacity.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No closed entry comparables or state-matched historical exit comparables establish a normalized operating state, entry multiple, or downside multiple adjustment.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive fixed-base service basket reconciled to controllable value added is available; constant-price operator-controlled demand survival is therefore left missing.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Selection uncertainty is mandatory because the frozen HVAC and plumbing count ranges overlap. The cash-cost role basis is source-free, and every unavailable target-specific primitive remains explicitly missing.

scenario_narratives.low: Low scenario primitives remain unavailable rather than being inferred from broad industry data, so this packet provides no low-case economic claim.
scenario_narratives.base: Base scenario primitives remain unavailable pending selected-archetype financial, operating, commercial, transaction, and demand evidence.
scenario_narratives.high: High scenario primitives remain unavailable rather than assuming implementation success, commercial retention, buyer access, or multiple expansion.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No selected-archetype trailing-twelve-month accrual recognized-revenue record was supplied.

evidence.rationale: No target-specific revenue presentation or pass-through reconciliation was supplied.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Cash compensation and associated removable cash burden, excluding any denominator pass-through.

amount.rationale: The frozen assumption basis requires a bounded source-free cash-cost amount; no target-specific amount was supplied.
caveats: Zero is a placeholder assumption, not a measured payroll amount.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Controllable contractor cash cost for operator-controlled delivery, excluding any denominator pass-through.

amount.rationale: The frozen assumption basis requires a bounded source-free cash-cost amount; no target-specific contractor ledger was supplied.
caveats: Zero is a placeholder assumption, not a measured contractor amount.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet retains the frozen HVAC-focused contractor archetype and makes no industry-wide economic claim.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through categories are authored, so the canonical gross-of-all reconciliation has two empty partitions.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removability is a source-free assumption and is not used to represent implementation, commercial retention, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is left missing and is not embedded in cash removability, commercial retention, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is left missing and is not embedded in realization, investment, valuation, or constant-price survival.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Sale availability, buyer access and win, capacity, and multiples are separate missing primitives rather than substituted for one another.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The normalized state and multiple anchor are both missing; no alternative operating state or sponsor transformation is introduced.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed multiple exclusion map excludes commercial retention and constant-price survival alongside all other prohibited channels.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket is constrained to the fixed-base constant-price controllable-value-added definition and does not substitute revenue or price growth.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing pending accrual revenue, pass-through, payroll, and contractor documentation.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents defensible measurement of the removable cash-cost opportunity.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Operational realization, investment, and commercial retention
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing for each year of the five-year horizon.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents separating operational savings, change cost, and commercial capture.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Buyability, valuation, and constant-price demand survival
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing pending transaction, buyer-capacity, comparable, and fixed-base service evidence.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents defensible opportunity, multiple, and survival measurement.

reviewer_note: The frozen source-free assumption basis and selection uncertainty require UNPROVEN readiness downstream. This packet intentionally contains no score, interval, gate, action, verdict, or finalized record.
